Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>

    x11/budgie-desktop: update to 10.8

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/BuddiesOfBudgie/budgie-desktop/releases/tag/v10.8

    Budgie 10.8 is a brand new release series for Budgie Desktop, featuring
    improvements to Budgie Menu, adoption of StatusNotifier support in System Tray,
    Magpie v0.x support, and more!

    PR:             273269
    Reported by:    duchateau.olivier@gmail.com (maintainer)
